title: ORM models batch 4 — analytics, automation & product tables (remaining tables)
description: Add SQLAlchemy ORM model classes for remaining tables not covered in batches 1-3. analytics.py: Dashboard, Widget, Report, ReportSchedule (4+). automation.py: AutomationRule, AutomationAction, AutomationLog (3+). product.py: Product, ProductCategory, ProductUnit, ProductPriceList (4+). Count total remaining tables from sql/001_schema.sql sections 7+ that are not yet covered. All subclass src.internal.db.Base. No relationships(). No indexes(). Depends on roadmap-db-migration-07-orm-batch3-marketing-activity.
acceptance: Each new models/*.py file has correct __tablename__ strings matching the schema; test files confirm all models are importable and have primary keys; pytest all 3 test files -v pass; net diff under 400 lines
